name: De-slop Verify
instructions:
Clean up AI slop from the implementation without changing behavior.

Remove:
- Unnecessary comments (especially obvious ones like '// loop through items')
- Dead code, unused imports, unreachable branches
- Over-engineered abstractions (premature generalization, unnecessary wrappers)
- Verbose variable names that add no clarity
- Debug artifacts (console.log, print statements, TODO comments)

After cleanup, run the full test suite to confirm nothing broke. Do NOT refactor across module boundaries.
